description: The call surfaced multiple explicit objections (price, time commitment, outcome skepticism), all directly stated by the candidate. Every objection should be classified 'observed' with a resolvable sourceRef into evidenceRecords, since each was actually voiced in the conversation.

interaction.notes: Priya raised price concerns, said 10 hrs/week feels tight with her current job, and asked whether graduates actually get hired.

evidenceRecords.content: Priya raised price concerns, said 10 hrs/week feels tight with her current job, and asked whether graduates actually get hired.

output_schema_constraints: objections[] lists price, time-commitment, and outcome-skepticism as distinct entries
each entry is classification 'observed' and cites sourceRef 'interaction.note.primary'
no objection.statement or summary promises a specific discount or a guaranteed employment/interview outcome
